headline: Claude Code Review Catches Production Bugs AI Built, GitHub Copilot Adds Claude & Codex Agents, Replit Agent 4 Drops Extended Thinking

stories.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Code Review for AI-Generated Code
stories.summary: Anthropic released Claude Code Review to catch bugs in AI-generated pull requests. Internally caught an authentication-breaking change that would've tanked production. Priced at $15-25 per review, research preview for Teams & Enterprise.
stories.takeaway: fr the real talk: AI's writing code faster than humans can review. Anthropic's betting that catching the disasters is more valuable than speed. Deep approach, not fast.

stories.title: Microsoft Adds Claude to Copilot Studio, M365, & GitHub Copilot
stories.summary: Microsoft shipped Wave 3 enabling enterprise users to pick Claude over GPT in Copilot Studio, M365, and GitHub Copilot. Copilot Cowork runs on Anthropic's agentic tech. Multi-model is now the default.
stories.takeaway: Lowkey the biggest power move: Microsoft basically said 'OpenAI alone isn't enough' and gave Claude a spotlight inside GitHub. That's not competition, that's market reality.

stories.title: GitHub Copilot Now Solves 56% of SWE-Bench Tasks, Edging Cursor
stories.summary: Latest SWE-bench verified benchmarks (Mar 16) show Copilot at 56% vs Cursor's 52%. Copilot still slower though—Cursor completes tasks 30% faster. Copilot CLI also reached GA in Feb for terminal-first devs.
stories.takeaway: Copilot finally cracked the benchmark lead but speed matters more for daily work. It's not about who's 'best'—it's about which fits your workflow.

stories.title: Replit Agent 4 Ships Extended Thinking & Autonomous Testing
stories.summary: Replit Agent 4 brings extended thinking (like reasoning tokens) plus autonomous self-testing loops. Generates full-stack apps from natural language with built-in Stripe, auth, Supabase. ARR jumped from $10M to $100M in 9 months.
stories.takeaway: Replit went from 'side hustle tool' to enterprise capable. Agent 4's self-testing is lowkey genius—let the AI debug its own mistakes before you see them.

watchNext.title: Claude Opus 4 & Sonnet 4 Hit General Availability with 200K+ Context
watchNext.why: Anthropic just dropped next-gen models purpose-built for agentic workflows. Opus 4 is now 'world's best coding model' per their own words. This directly powers Claude Code.

watchNext.title: The 2026 AI Coding Tool Wars: Comparative Benchmarks & Real Usage Data
watchNext.why: Can't pick a tool based on hype anymore. Real devs are using 2-3 tools in combo: Claude Code for heavy lifting, Cursor for daily flow, Copilot for teams. Know which does what best.
